Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Magisters]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — The Magisters are a group capable of setting boats on fire from a distance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — The Magisters is a guild with a Guild Head.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Magisters carry staves possessed of potent natural forces.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 16''' — The Magisters are a group that Albadol Crane once trained under.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 6''' — Magisters are gathering because they sense something coming.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — The Magisters are part of the Imperialist alliance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — The Magisters are a group working to protect the people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Magisters can explain how Reading is used to Awaken stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 18''' — The Magisters are gathering weapons.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — The Magisters spend their time trying to dredge up artifacts of a past they know nothing about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Many Magisters are present in the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Magisters are one of the groups expected to attack Gray Island.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — The Magister’s Guild has not appointed a new Head since the death of Mekendi Maxeus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — The Magisters wear robes and carry staves.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Magisters can collaborate on creating boxes to seal Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Magisters unleashed their powers in the streets of the Imperial Palace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 8''' — Magisters are part of an army facing Shera and Meia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — The Magisters stole pseudo-Gardeners trained by Maxwell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 14''' — Magisters are part of a panel formed by Calder to counter reports.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — Magisters can hide Intent from Reading.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 23''' — Darius had previously tried to stop Shera from killing Magisters.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
